boundary.source: Harmonizome DepMap CRISPR Gene Dependency gene-cell-line Z-score associations

artifacts.description: Target gene dependency Z-score in matched DepMap/Harmonizome cell line; absent association encoded as 0.
artifacts.promotion_note: Must pass shuffle/LODO/source controls before GPU; this preflight is not sufficient alone.

artifacts.description: Binary target gene dependency indicator in matched DepMap/Harmonizome cell line.
artifacts.promotion_note: Must pass shuffle/LODO/source controls before GPU; this preflight is not sufficient alone.

artifacts.description: Target-level maximum DepMap/Harmonizome CRISPR dependency Z-score across all cell lines; not cell-line matched.
artifacts.promotion_note: Higher confounding risk than matched-cell-line dependency; must beat target/actionability and gene-label shuffle controls before GPU.

artifacts.description: Target-level fraction of DepMap/Harmonizome cell lines with a CRISPR dependency association; not cell-line matched.
artifacts.promotion_note: Higher confounding risk than matched-cell-line dependency; must beat target/actionability and gene-label shuffle controls before GPU.
